_comment: Merge the contents of `hooks.PreToolUse` below into .claude/settings.json. Do NOT replace the whole file — preserve any existing hooks/permissions/etc. If hooks.PreToolUse already exists, append this matcher entry to its array.

hooks.command: if [ -f "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/scripts/activate-dotnet.sh" ]; then source "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/scripts/activate-dotnet.sh"; fi && SLN=$(ls "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR"/*.sln 2>/dev/null | head -1) && if [ -z "$SLN" ]; then echo "[pre-commit] No .sln at repo root — skipping format."; else (cd "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" && dotnet format "$SLN") && (git -C "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" diff --cached --name-only -z -- '*.cs' | xargs -0 -r git -C "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" add); fi
